SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Application
The Reactive REST Web Service server application with the Redis.
The Redis is the in-memory data store.
CompanyRouter
The router for the handlers.
Constants
The constants.
Department
The department.
A domain object to be persisted to the Redis.
DepartmentHandler
The WebFlux handler for the Department.
Uses reactive Redis operations for 'string' values.
DepartmentSubscriber
The subscriber for the departments.
Employee
The employee.
A domain object to be persisted to the Redis.
EmployeeHandler
The WebFlux handler for the Employee.
Uses reactive Redis operations for 'string' values.
EmployeeSubscriber
The subscriber for the employees.
RedisOperationsCreator
The creator for the Redis operations
(the ReactiveRedisOperations and the ReactiveZSetOperations).
SampleDatasetHandler
The WebFlux handler for the sample dataset loading.
Team
The team.
A domain object to be persisted to the Redis.
TeamHandler
The WebFlux handler for the Teams.
Uses Redis ZSet (sorted set) specific operations.
TeamSubscriber
The subscriber for the teams.
TeamTuple
The wrapper for the Team and its score.
WebClientLauncher
The WebClient launcher.
The WebClient is the non-blocking, reactive client.
